english: O Narayana, embodiment of compassion, be my refuge
roman: Narayan karuna maya sharana me bhava

english: O Krishna, beloved of the Gopis, Govinda, Damodara
roman: Gopi jana priya Krishna Govinda Damodara

english: Madhava, Madhava, Madhava — I worship Govinda
Govinda, supreme bliss — always remember Govinda
Dwelling on the banks of Yamuna, playing the flute
Madhava the beloved of Radhika, Govinda, Damodara
Sweet, sweet is his form — remember Govinda
After completing the bath and performing daily worship with devotion
roman: Snanam samapya ratim eva vidhaya nityam

english: O Govinda, O Damodara, O Madhava
Chanting with mind that is steady and pure
One always attains the supreme state
